{"target_file":"index.html","code":"<!doctype html>\n<html lang=\"en\">\n\n<head>\n  <meta charset=\"UTF-8\" />\n  <meta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\" />\n  <title>FouriqTech — Next-Gen Digital Services</title>\n  <link rel=\"icon\" type=\"image/png\" href=\"/4Q.png?v=3\" />\n  <link rel=\"apple-touch-icon\" href=\"/4Q.png?v=3\" />\n  <!-- Preconnect for Google Fonts to eliminate render-blocking -->\n  <link rel=\"preconnect\" href=\"https://fonts.googleapis.com\" />\n  <link rel=\"preconnect\" href=\"https://fonts.gstatic.com\" crossorigin />\n  <!-- Fonts loaded as link (not CSS @import) — async, non-blocking -->\n  <link rel=\"stylesheet\"\n    href=\"https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap\" />\n  <!-- Critical inline styles: black bg + stable scrollbar gutter to prevent CLS from overflow toggling -->\n  <style>\n    html {\n      background: #000;\n      /* Reserve scrollbar space so toggling overflow never shifts content */\n      scrollbar-gutter: stable;\n      scrollbar-width: none;\n    }\n\n    body {\n      background: #000;\n      margin: 0;\n      /* Prevent scrollbar layout shift */\n      overflow-y: scroll;\n    }\n\n    ::-webkit-scrollbar {\n      width: 0;\n      background: transparent;\n    }\n  </style>\n</head>\n\n<body>\n  <div id=\"root\">\n    <!-- Ensure the hero image component within /src/main.tsx or downstream components -->\n    <!-- uses fetchpriority=\"high\" and removes loading=\"lazy\" for LCP optimization -->\n  </div>\n  <script type=\"module\" src=\"/src/main.tsx\" defer></script>\n</body>\n\n</html>"}
